title: Highly Detailed 3D Layered Papercraft Illustration
sourceTitle: Highly Detailed 3d Layered Papercraft Illustration Featuring
prompt: A highly detailed 3D layered papercraft illustration featuring a whimsical travel and adventure concept. The vertical composition is centered on a stylish young woman with short, curly dark brown hair and round glasses, wearing a teal utility jacket over a mustard yellow shirt and rust-orange high-waisted trousers. She is holding a classic vintage film camera up to her face as if taking a photo. Surrounding her are multiple miniature, stylized cartoon versions of herself in various poses: one sketching in a notebook with a beret and scarf, two playing acoustic guitars, and another closely examining a vintage golden compass. The background is a rich teal color featuring a golden-yellow world map, adorned with retro travel stamps, ink bottles, and scrapbook-style label cutouts with text like "EXPLORE" and "MINI ADVENTURER". The entire artwork has a premium, handcrafted look with distinct drop shadows, textured cardboard edges, and a warm, nostalgic color palette of teal, rust, mustard, and cream.
